A '''battle''' on Hoth was one of the major battles waged between the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]] and the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]. Lord [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]] commanded the forces of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] during this battle.

{{Battle-stub}}
